---
title: "Patriots of Palestine: A Story of the Maccabees, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘Under the Storm’ ‘The Slaves of Sabinus’ etc."
---

## Patriots of Palestine: A Story of the Maccabees, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘Under the Storm’ ‘The Slaves of Sabinus’ etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** October 1898
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, Westminster, New York: Thomas Whittaker, 2 & 3 Bible House.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
